summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Asset Management System. All API endpoints working correctly, asset sync from filesystem functioning properly, file hash-based change detection implemented.
passed_tests: GET /api/assets - Returns 58 assets with correct structure
GET /api/assets/{asset_key} - Logo and OehLi-Logo assets retrieved with valid data URLs
GET /api/assets?category=logo - Category filtering returns 2 logo assets
GET /api/assets?category=background - Category filtering returns 30 background assets
GET /api/assets?category=team - Category filtering returns 20 team assets
Asset sync from filesystem verified - all expected assets found
Server startup asset synchronization working (51 assets synced)
